mapper.sql: id, user_id, contact_name, contact_phone, province, city, district, address, detail_address, latitude, longitude, is_default, label, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET user_id = #{userId}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address = #{address}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, is_default = #{isDefault}, label = #{label}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
